query: 打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？

transcript.content: 需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：

decision.archive_summary: Resolved earlier design iterations: user wanted automatic, continuously updating context display without manual refresh; assistant first proposed multiple surfaces, then traced an accidental dependency to Project Assistant, and user required a strict boundary. That boundary issue was resolved by moving to a standalone VS Code extension. Durable design decision: keep a single integrated UX, with brief status-bar summary, click-to-open small detail window, dynamic auto-refresh, and remove live-panel.md as the main entry.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest exchange stays on the same active topic: behavior of the standalone Codex Context Monitor across VS Code windows, so relation=continue. Raw context needed next is the recent merged-design block and the immediate Q/A about new-window behavior. Earlier turns about the initial multi-surface idea and the Project Assistant detour are resolved and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. The user’s durable constraints should survive as pins: keep the extension separate from Project Assistant, and preserve the merged single-UX design from the later requirement.

applied.archiveSummary: Resolved earlier design iterations: user wanted automatic, continuously updating context display without manual refresh; assistant first proposed multiple surfaces, then traced an accidental dependency to Project Assistant, and user required a strict boundary. Durable design decision: keep a single integrated UX, with brief status-bar summary, click-to-open small detail window, dynamic auto-refresh, and remove live-panel.md as the main entry.
